persistenceSequence.notes: Edge function returns items array; no DB write in extract-invoice/index.ts
Delete-all-then-insert pattern. Return value/error NOT checked.
Bulk insert; insertError is checked and thrown

persistenceSequence.action: loadItems + load() refresh UI after reExtract

schemaConstraints.uniquePerInvoice: NONE — invoice_items has no unique constraint on (invoice_id, name)
schemaConstraints.rlsDelete: items_delete_own — delete allowed when parent invoice owned by auth.uid()

concurrencyRisk.mechanism: Two overlapping reExtract/runExtraction calls can both pass delete (0 rows) then both insert 8 rows → 16 rows
concurrencyRisk.evidence: DB shows two insert batches 9ms apart (2026-06-11T22:41:41.517584 and .526773), 8 rows each

priorAuditReference: .tmp/persistence-audit/REPORT.md — persistence is lossless; stale DB was prior issue, not corruption
